mapper.select:
SELECT user_space.id , user_space.deleted , user_space.created_at as createdAt , user_space.modified_at as modifiedAt
, user_space.role , user_space.status , user_space.user_id as userId , user_space.space_id as spaceId
, space.work_name as workName , space.space_code as spaceCode
, tb_group.group_name as groupName , tb_group.id as groupId
, (SELECT u.name FROM user_space admin_us JOIN user u ON admin_us.user_id = u.id WHERE admin_us.space_id = user_space.space_id AND admin_us.role = 'ADMIN' AND admin_us.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1) as adminName
, (SELECT u.name FROM user_space admin_us JOIN user u ON admin_us.user_id = u.id WHERE admin_us.space_id = user_space.space_id AND admin_us.role = 'USER' AND admin_us.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1) as userName FROM user_space LEFT JOIN space ON user_space.space_id = space.id LEFT JOIN tb_group ON space.group_id = tb_group.id WHERE user_space.id = #{id}

SELECT user_space.id FROM user_space LEFT JOIN space ON user_space.space_id = space.id
AND space.deleted = false

SELECT user_space.id FROM user_space LEFT JOIN space ON user_space.space_id = space.id LEFT JOIN tb_group ON space.group_id = tb_group.id
AND space.deleted = false
ORDER BY user_space.id ASC DESC
Limit #{calculatedOffset}, #{perPage}

SELECT count(user_space.id) FROM user_space LEFT JOIN space ON user_space.space_id = space.id LEFT JOIN tb_group ON space.group_id = tb_group.id
AND space.deleted = false
